Canvas Salon West Midtown:: Balayage, Haircuts, Silk Press, Blow Drys, HandTied Extensions, Braided Sew In, Relaxer, Short Haircut, Color Correction, Keratin Treatments, West Midtown
0
SALON POLICIES
TEXT BASED SALON
At Canvas Salon quality, accuracy, and consistency are the core values of our business. To ensure a seamless client experience we are now a TEXT BASED salon. To book an appointment, please click the “book now” link. Please feel free to text your designated stylist with any questions or concerns.
BOOKING
We’re proud to host a talented team of independent stylists who collaborate in a shared space. Please be aware that each stylist operates their own business independently. Policies regarding appointments, pricing and cancellations may differ. For the most accurate information, kindly reach out directly to the stylist you’re booking with.
CANCELLATIONS
We understand that sometimes schedule adjustments are necessary; therefore, we respectfully require 48 hours notice for cancellations or changes to the service scheduled. If you cancel your appointment with less than 48 hours notice, you will be charged 50% of the cost of the service scheduled.
CONFIRMATION TEXT
48 hours prior to your appointment, you will receive a reminder text and will need to click the link to confirm. If you do not confirm, your appointment will be cancelled and the cancellation policy will apply.
DEPOSITS
Deposits are non-refundable.
PLEASE DO NOT BRING GUESTS WITH YOU TO YOUR APPOINTMENT. WE ARE A BOUTIQUE SALON AND SPACE IS LIMITED.

meta.meta_description:
Discover the ultimate hair transformation experience at Canvas Salon in 
Atlanta, Georgia. Our expert stylists specialize in a wide range of 
services including haircuts, balayage, extensions, silk press, blowouts and 
more. Visit us for top notch services that will leave you feeling 
confident. Book your appointment today and let us bring your hair vision to 
life.
